t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~
t_en: Ba na na na~

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~
t_en: Ba na na na~
Bana...

t_ch: <size=36>大岚神在上！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>By the Great Lan above!!</size>

t_ch: 多么恐怖、千钧一发的场面。在这丑时三刻，庄严的摩天楼将化为壮绝狩猎的起点！
t_en: A most terrifying close call that was. But fear not! The darkest hour of the night may be upon us, but this majestic skyscraper shall now welcome the start of an epic hunt!

t_ch: 好、好痛！
t_en: O—Ouch!

t_ch: 何等狡诈的陷阱！不仅邪祟遍布，还有四处横飞的暗器！
t_en: What kind of devious trap is this!? Not only are there fiendlings abound, but there are also concealed weapons flying about!

t_ch: 你是谁？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: 初次见面，在下——缭乱忍侠•AKA乱破是也。
t_en: Greetings, I am the Dazzling Ninja, AKA Rappa.

t_ch: 唱得不错。
t_en: Your rapping is great.

t_ch: 说唱？非也，在下咏诵的乃是忍•真言。
t_en: Rapping? That's not it. What I'm reciting is the mantra of a ninja.

t_ch: 明明是你自己扔的吧！
t_en: You clearly threw those yourself!

t_ch: 非也。阁下太过善良，不知是这些邪祟用妖术操纵了它的落点。
t_en: I'm afraid you're mistaken. You're simply too good-hearted to realize that the fiendlings were manipulating its landing spot with sorcery.

t_ch: 蕉蕉？
t_en: Bana?

t_ch: 诸般邪祟，速速退下。不然在下就要让汝等领教缭乱•忍法的厉害了。
t_en: Be gone, fiendlings! Or I shall give you a taste of my Dazzling Ninjutsu!

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Bananana! Bananana!

t_ch: 这…不可能，怎会如此？
t_en: That's... impossible. How can it be?

t_ch: 你听懂了？
t_en: You understood that?

t_ch: 它们说了什么！
t_en: What did they say!?

t_ch: 在下…竟然无法与这些邪祟沟通！
t_en: I... I am unable to communicate with these fiendlings!

t_ch: 别让这个怪人打断你的幸福时光，快听，小猴们还在发出幸福的邀请——
t_en: Don't let this weirdo interrupt your happy moments. Listen, the little monkeys are still joyfully inviting you—

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
t_en: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

t_ch: （唔，又来了…好奇怪的感觉。）
t_en: (Oh, here it is again... That strange feeling.)

t_ch: 小心！这也是邪祟妖术！请阁下咬紧牙关，在下来助你脱险——
t_en: Be on your guard! This is also part of the fiendlings' sorcery! Hang in there, I'll get you out of this right away.

t_ch: 缭乱•空手道•正气断惑手刀！
t_en: Dazzling Palm: Righteous Chop!
—Bam!

t_ch: 多么震撼！忍者猛然敲击你的眉心，强劲的力道透过身体直击魂魄，刹那间五感尽断，猴鸣声也一并消弭。
t_en: How shocking! The ninja strikes your forehead with such force. Its powerful impact reverberates through your body, striking your very soul. In an instant, all your five senses are severed, and the sound of monkeys ceases.

t_ch: 好疼！
t_en: That hurt!

t_ch: 这下清醒了。
t_en: Well, I'm definitely awake now.

t_ch: 差点没给我星核敲碎。
t_en: That almost shattered my Stellaron.

t_ch: 抱歉。这是直击灵魂的缭乱•空手道，在下已尽力控制力道，但为了唤醒阁下，疼痛依然在所难免。
t_en: My humble apologies, Dazzling Palm was designed to deliver a powerful impact to the soul. I've endeavored to control my strength, but some pain is inevitable if I am to ensure your regained consciousness.

t_ch: 蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Bana! Bana bana!

t_ch: 你们面前的猴子面露凶相，好像在说——「搞什么鬼」。
t_en: The monkeys in front of you have a fierce look on their faces, as if saying, "What the heck is going on?"

t_ch: 哼，阴谋败露，原形毕露了啊。它们正在呼唤邪猿•伙伴，阁下，请躲到我身后！
t_en: Hmph, showing your true colors now that your evil schemes have been exposed? They're calling for their fellow ape fiendlings. Please take cover behind me!

t_ch: 它们作鸟兽散了。这群邪祟心中有鬼，此地不宜久留。
t_en: They've scampered off in different directions. Those fiendlings are up to no good. We'd better get moving.

t_ch: 快让我走吧。
t_en: Let me leave.

t_ch: 百分明智的判断，阁下也有成为忍者•大师的资质。
t_en: A wise judgment. You have the aptitude to become a ninja master too.

t_ch: 我还不想走…
t_en: I don't want to leave yet...

t_ch: 阁下还未从妖术中醒来吗？莫非是正气断惑手刀的忍力消散了，让在下再来一次……
t_en: Are you still under their spell? Or has the ninja power of my Righteous Chop dissipated? Fear not, I can do it again!

t_ch: 别，我们走吧。
t_en: No thanks. Let's get going.

t_ch: 你到底是谁啊！？
t_en: Who exactly are you!?

t_ch: 忍者有问必答——初次见面，在下AKA乱破是也。
t_en: I never leave a question unanswered. I am a ninja, AKA Rappa.

t_ch: 《银河忍法帖》有云：「当断则断，不受其乱。」仍有邪祟在附近徘徊，我们速速离去。
t_en: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "Be decisive, lest we be overwhelmed by the consequences." There are still fiendlings roaming nearby. Let us be on our way.

t_ch: （唱歌的猴子、唱歌的忍者…我是在做梦吗？）
t_en: (Singing monkeys and a singing ninja... Am I dreaming?)

t_ch: 阁下确实在做梦。
t_en: You are indeed.. ...dreaming.

t_ch: 只要触碰此物便可回到安全的地方，梦土「毗乃昆尼」果真玄奥无穷。
t_en: You can return to a safe location after touching this object. "Pinecany" truly is filled with boundless mysteries.

t_ch: 既然有缘相遇，辞别之前，可否请教阁下尊姓大名？
t_en: Since fate saw fit to bring us together, may I know your name before we part ways?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}。
t_en: {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 银河球棒侠。
t_en: I am the Galactic Baseballer.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}忍者。
t_en: Ninja {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 真是个响亮的名号——你好，<color=#dbc291ff>球棒•忍者</color>！
t_en: A strong name! Well met, <color=#dbc291ff>Baseball Bat Ninja</color>!

t_ch: 完全不一样啊！
t_en: That's not what I said!

t_ch: 你想叫啥就叫啥吧…
t_en: Eh... Close enough.

t_ch: 你好，缭乱·忍侠
t_en: Well met indeed, Dazzling Ninja Hero

t_ch: 球棒•忍者，在下再多嘴奉劝一句，为了安全，阁下和伙伴们最好尽快远离梦土。
t_en: Forgive me for speaking out of turn, Baseball Bat Ninja. But for your safety, you and your companions should leave this land of dreams as soon as possible.

t_ch: 这群邪祟的出现乃是大祸之兆，是我等忍侠的{RUBY_B#猎物}死敌{RUBY_E#}在觊觎此地的证明——
t_en: The appearance of these fiendlings are a sign of impending disaster. It is proof that the Ninja Hero's {RUBY_B#prey}archenemy{RUBY_E#} has their eyes set on the land.

t_ch: 无情、无泪、无慈悲的<color=#dbc291ff>「御猿•邪忍」</color>。
t_en: The emotionless, soulless, and merciless <color=#dbc291ff>Evil Ninja Osaru</color>.

t_ch: 谁？
t_en: Who?

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 什么鬼？
t_en: What the...

t_ch: 辞别之时已至。请阁下多多保重，再会！
t_en: It is time for me to depart. Please do take care. Goodbye!

t_ch: 电光石火！你话音未落，忍者便已跃入梦泡，消失得无影无踪。这一切发生得太快，常人的动态视力完全无法捕捉到过程。
t_en: Lightning fast! Before you finish speaking, the ninja has already leaped into the dream bubble and vanished without a trace. It all happens so quickly that the average person's eyes can't keep up.

t_ch: （…看来这里的确是出口，快走吧。）
t_en: (...This does look like the way out. Let's go.)

t_ch: 进入梦泡。
t_en: Enter Dream Bubble.

t_ch: 你鼓起勇气翻越栏杆，进入猴子形状的梦泡之中……
t_en: You gather your courage and climb over the railing, entering the monkey-shaped dream bubble...

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana bana, bana bana...

t_ch: 这只猴子和你刚刚见到的那些家伙一样目光呆滞，如果再跟它对视几秒，你的智力属性可能会受到影响。
t_en: This monkey looks just as dazed as the ones you saw earlier. If you stare at it for a few more seconds, your intelligence might be affected.

t_ch: 你仔细观察，它眼中映出的并非是你的身影，而是一个…巨大的香蕉？
t_en: If you look closely, you'll see that its eyes don't reflect your image, but instead... a giant banana?

t_ch: ——停，别继续看了。
t_en: Stop, don't look any longer.

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉蕉。
t_en: Bananana... Bananana!

t_ch: 这只猴子貌似在给其他猴子讲课，但你听不懂这些*蕉言蕉语*——希望在折纸大学的课上，你不会有同样的感受。
t_en: This monkey seems to be teaching other monkeys, but you can't understand their Bananese — let's hope you don't feel the same way in your classes at Paperfold University.

t_ch: 银河忍法帖•前情提要
t_en: Previously on Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions

t_ch: 很久很久以前，在某个遥远的世界，有一座繁华的城邦。此城世代由一位忍侠把持大权，世人称其为「忍之都」。
t_en: A long, long time ago in a world far away, there was a city that flourished under the rule of a Ninja Hero for many generations. It was known as the Ninja Capital.

t_ch: 在忍侠守护下，城中百姓安居乐业，一片欣欣向荣，连忍之都的下水道都会溢出幸福的气息。
t_en: Under the protection of the Ninja Hero, the people of the city thrived. They lived and worked in peace and happiness could be felt even in the sewers of the Ninja Capital.

t_ch: 直到——名为「御猿•邪忍」的恶徒谋害忍侠，篡夺城主之位。往日的幸福即刻化作泡影……
t_en: Until an evildoer known as Evil Ninja Osaru murdered the Ninja Hero and laid claim to the city. The happiness of days past disappeared in an instant.

t_ch: 忍历五十六年 忍之都
t_en: <unbreak>56</unbreak>th Year of Ninja Era, the Ninja Capital

t_ch: 初入忍道的女孩，老夫认可你的决心。今日起，你便是缭乱•忍法的传人了。
t_en: O child new to the way of the ninja, I recognize your determination. Henceforth, you shall be the successor to my Dazzling Ninjutsu.

t_ch: 感谢苦茶大师，弟子不胜荣幸。
t_en: Thank you, Master Kucha. This is my greatest honor.

t_ch: 看这阴翳中的城邦！苦难、仇恨、悲伤，都在浸满罪恶的土地中滋长，血泪汇聚的浪将吞没一切希望。
t_en: Behold the city of shadow! A sinful land of suffering, hatred, and sorrow. Bloody tears soon to devour all hope for the morrow.

t_ch: 皆因无情无泪的御猿•邪忍，施展邪术令百姓沉沦，纵容邪祟倚势凌人，引得天下共愤。
t_en: Soulless Evil Ninja Osaru, agent of the vile, cast the masses into sin by foul arts and guile. Fiendlings indulgent in evil gone wild, enraged the hearts of all — man, woman, and child.

t_ch: 你将接过忍侠的遗业，清算邪忍的罪孽，终结忍之都的长夜，还百姓一个清平世界。
t_en: Inherit the legacy of the Ninja Hero and wipe clean the sins of Osaru. End the suffering wrought upon the Ninja Capital and bring peace back to its people.

t_ch: 如此连贯的忍•真言，不愧是苦茶大师！在下定会努力修行，终有一日成为「缭乱忍侠」！
t_en: An astounding recitation of the ninja mantra, Master Kucha! I swear I will train hard until I become the Dazzling Ninja!

t_ch: 多么令人敬佩的觉悟！为与邪忍抗衡，你还需要一个新的名字，属于忍者的名字。
t_en: An admirable resolution! To contend with the Evil Ninja, you will also need a new name — a name befitting a ninja.

t_ch: 那弟子该叫什么呢？
t_en: What should I be called?

t_ch: 我不知道，忍徒。名字会承载你的理想，铭刻信念，昭示命运。它是属于你自己的忍号。
t_en: I don't know, my disciple. Your name will carry your ideals, your convictions, and your destiny. Your ninja name belongs to you alone.

t_ch: ——所以，你要自己决定。
t_en: So, the decision is yours to make.

t_ch: （真是莫名其妙的梦…这里总该是折纸大学了吧？）
t_en: (What a baffling dream... I should now be at Paperfold University, right?)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}——我们在这呢！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! We're over here!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，怎么来这么晚？又跟谁跑艾迪恩公园玩去了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're late! Did you run off to Aideen Park with someone to clown about again?

t_ch: 我遇到了好多猴子…
t_en: I met a lot of monkeys...

t_ch: 我遇到了一个忍者…
t_en: I met a ninja...

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉…
t_en: Bana bana...

t_ch: 你向大家讲述了方才的怪梦……
t_en: You tell everyone about the strange dream you just had...

t_ch: 猴子、忍者…听着不像是匹诺康尼发生的事，更像一个梦泡。
t_en: Monkeys and a ninja... That doesn't sound like something that happened in Penacony. Seems more like a dream bubble.

t_ch: 嗯…你说的猴子，难不成是指它们？
t_en: Uhh, those monkeys you were talking about... Is that them?

t_ch: 怎么这里也有！
t_en: There are monkeys here too!?

t_ch: 就是它们！
t_en: That's them!

t_ch: 我还在做梦呢？
t_en: Am I still dreaming?

t_ch: 我就说呢，还真是「睡蕉小猴」啊。
t_en: I knew you had to be talking about Slumbernana Monkey.

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴？
t_en: Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 给你介绍下，这是折纸大学现在最流行的小家伙，比钟表小子还火。
t_en: Allow me to introduce you to the most popular little guy in Paperfold University! It's more beloved than Clockie.

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴喜欢偷懒、爱吃香蕉，生活在「睡蕉的时刻」，过着无忧无虑的生活。
t_en: Slumbernana Monkey likes goofing off and loves eating bananas. It lives a carefree life in the Moment of Slumbernana.

t_ch: 它也是「钟表匠」创作的动画人物？
t_en: Is it also a cartoon character created by the Watchmaker?

t_ch: 不是不是，它是最近才出现的…迷什么来着…哦，{RUBY_B#「梗」}迷因{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: No, no, it only appeared recently. It's a... What's it called again? A me... A {RUBY_B#"mimeme"}meme{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: 也不知源头是什么，一夜间就火了。粉丝们总结了一套只有小猴迷才听得懂的*蕉语*，还为它制作了各种表情包和同人！
t_en: No one knows where it came from. It just blew up overnight. Fans made up Bananese that only fellow fans would understand, and even created sticker packs and fan works!

t_ch: 最出圈的就是那首《睡蕉之歌》——蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
t_en: The most popular one is the Slumbernana Song. ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

t_ch: 听起来莫名其妙的。
t_en: That sounds really odd.

t_ch: 是有些莫名其妙，但越抽象的东西越容易传播嘛。
t_en: I guess it is a little odd, but abstract ideas are always the easiest to spread around.

t_ch: 你真是个冲浪高手。
t_en: You're really up to date.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，本姑娘现在可是紧跟时事的女大学生啊。
t_en: Heehee~ Of course! I'm a college student who keeps up with the times.

t_ch: 已经不想再品鉴了…
t_en: I don't want to listen to it anymore...

t_ch: 哦，你听过？可以，很新潮嘛。
t_en: Oh? You know the song? Not bad. You're keeping up with the trends.

t_ch: 你从哪知道这么多的？
t_en: How do you know so much?

t_ch: 当然是「校友群」啦，开学前先加群混个脸熟，这不是常识嘛。
t_en: From the campus group chat, of course. I joined the group before school even started so I'd get to know more people. That's just common sense.

t_ch: 这么不合群，小心入学以后交不到朋友。来，我把你们也拉进来！
t_en: You'll have a hard time making friends at school if you stay out of touch. Here, I'll add you two to the group.

t_ch: 办梦境通信卡吗？新生有优惠哦！
t_en: Looking for a Dreamscape Card? We have a promo for new students!

t_ch: 朋友，需要助学贷款吗？
t_en: My friend, do you need a student loan?

t_ch: 要我帮你扛行李吗？扛你也行！
t_en: Do you need help carrying your bags? Or maybe carrying you?

t_ch: 时间差不多了，去办入学手续吧。
t_en: It's almost time. Let's proceed to admissions.

t_ch: 走吧走吧，彩色的校园生活在等我们呢。
t_en: Come on, let's go! A spectacular campus life awaits us!

t_ch: 可话说回来，家族为什么要在梦里办学？会有人专程跑「盛会之星」来读书吗？
t_en: Why is The Family running a school in a dream anyway? Do people really come to the Planet of Festivities just to study?

t_ch: 折纸大学建立于「拓梦时代」，最早是筑梦师的培训基地，创始人是当时的隐夜鸫家主格拉克斯。
t_en: Paperfold University was established during the Pioneering Era. It was initially a training ground for Dreamweavers and was founded by Glaux, head of the Nightingale Family.

t_ch: 后来鸢尾花与苜蓿草也参与到大学管理中，发展出如今的筑梦、谐乐、财富三大学院，折纸大学也一跃成为了闻名银河的艺术学府。
t_en: Later on, the Iris and Alfalfa Families also got involved in university operations, and the education landscape expanded into the three academies we have today: Dreamweaver, Charmony, and Fortune. From there, Paperfold University became known as the top arts school in the cosmos.

t_ch: 哇——这里真的是学校吗？看起来比影视乐园还豪华啊！
t_en: Wow! Is this really a school? It looks grander than the theme park!

t_ch: 折纸大学的校训是「美梦多彩，理想自由」，眼前的景象也算是印证了这句话。离校庆开幕式还有些时间，我们先四处逛逛吧。
t_en: Paperfold University's motto is "Color your dreams, free your ideals." What we see before us reaffirms those words. We still have some time before the anniversary celebration's opening ceremony. Let's take a look around.

t_ch: 蕉蕉！
t_en: Bana!

t_ch: 呀，好可爱的睡蕉小猴！
t_en: Ooh! Slumbernana Monkey is so cute!

t_ch: 哦，这位同学也是睡蕉小猴的*蕉粉*吗？
t_en: Oh, are you Slumbernana Monkey's Ripe Banana too?

t_ch: *蕉粉*谈不上，刚入坑的*新蕉*而已！你身边这是…玩偶吗？
t_en: You could say I'm more of a Fresh Banana than a Ripe Banana. Is that a plush next to you?

t_ch: 这是我在「创意集会」上买的，是不是很逼真？听摊主说这款特别火爆，专程去也不一定抢得到呢。
t_en: I bought this from the Creator's Market. Doesn't it look realistic? The booth owner said this design is especially popular and really hard to get.

t_ch: 蕉，蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Ba, Bana bana!

t_ch: 真可爱，种草了，有机会我也要去看看。
t_en: So cute! I want one! I'll go take a look when I get the chance.

t_ch: 嗨！新同学们！你们好啊！
t_en: Hello, new students! How are you?

t_ch: 这什么东西啊！
t_en: What is that!?

t_ch: 吓我一跳！
t_en: That scared me!

t_ch: 小东西长得挺别致。
t_en: It sure looks unique.

t_ch: 惊梦剧团！来战！
t_en: Dreamjolt Troupe, prepare for combat!

t_ch: 吓到你们了？抱歉！我是负责迎新的「助蕉<unbreak>416</unbreak>」！
t_en: Did I scare you? Sorry. I'm Assistanana <unbreak>416</unbreak> from the welcoming committee!

t_ch: 助蕉…是想说「助教」吗？
t_en: Assistanana? Like a teacher's assistant?

t_ch: 这是*蕉语*！现在同学们都爱睡蕉小猴，咱们这些教职人员也做足了功课，专门换了个造型蕉！
t_en: It's Bananese. Students are in love with Slumbernana Monkey right now, so our faculty did our homework and changed up our image, bana!

t_ch: 为什么折纸大学的教职人员是美梦剧团？
t_en: Why are the faculty in Paperfold University from the Sweet Dreams Troupe?

t_ch: 这位同学有所不知，校庆期间大部分老师都在参加学术研讨，校长就委托美梦剧团来填补师资空缺了蕉。
t_en: Most of the teachers are attending the academic conference during the school's anniversary. That's why the dean asked the Sweet Dreams Troupe to be substitute teachers, bana.

t_ch: 放心，*蕉师*们装载了资深教师的记忆，*蕉学*水平绝对可靠——但现在还不急着学习，大家先在彩梦校庆上玩个痛快蕉！
t_en: Don't you worry. The BananAdvisors come loaded with the memories of the senior professors. Our banacademic standards remain top-notch. There's no need to worry about studies right now though. Please enjoy the Dreamlight Anniversary first, bana!

t_ch: 当然，我就没打算好好学习！
t_en: I sure will! I wasn't planning to study anyway!

t_ch: 别这么理直气壮。
t_en: That's a bold declaration.

t_ch: 哈哈，没关系！折纸大学是自由的学府，请在这里尽情挥洒青春吧！
t_en: Haha, that's alright! Paperfold University is a school of freedom. Spend your youth however you'd like!

t_ch: 几位同学，请留步！
t_en: You there, please wait a moment!

t_ch: 咦？是在叫我们吗？
t_en: Huh? Are you talking to us?

t_ch: 你是…？
t_en: And you are...?

t_ch: 大老远就瞧见你们了，带着相机的粉红系美少女…你就是「赵相机」同学吧！
t_en: You guys were easy to spot. You, the pink pretty girl with the camera, you're Say~Cheese~, aren't you?

t_ch: 对，是我。
t_en: Yes, that's me.

t_ch: 哎，别闹别闹，人家找的是我！
t_en: Hey, stop messing around! She was looking for me!

t_ch: 美少女？
t_en: Pretty girl?

t_ch: 怎么，你有意见啊？
t_en: Got a problem with that?

t_ch: 赵相机？
t_en: Say~Cheese~?

t_ch: 是我啦。这不是听说大学生都爱起昵称，我就让大家直接叫网名了。
t_en: That's me. I heard college students love nicknames, so I decided to go by my online handle.

t_ch: 你好！我是校友群里的「独爱蕉宝」，各位可以叫我蒙塔娜。
t_en: Hi there! I'm TreasureNana from the campus group chat. You can call me Montana.

t_ch: 你好，我是丹恒。
t_en: Nice to meet you. My name is Dan Heng.

t_ch: 我是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I'm {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我是银河球棒侠。
t_en: I am the Galactic Baseballer.

t_ch: 我是球棒•忍者。
t_en: I'm Baseball Bat Ninja.

t_ch: …你什么时候给自己起了这名啊？
t_en: ...When did you start going by that name?

t_ch: 天呐，我认得你！你不是这一届的盛会巨星吗？大明星啊！
t_en: Oh gosh, I recognize you! You're this season's Festive Superstar! You're famous!

t_ch: 真没想到能和你这样的大人物当同学，我敢打赌，你一定会被分到「谐乐学院」的！
t_en: I never thought I'd go to the same school with someone famous. I bet you'll be assigned to the Charmony Academy!

t_ch: 分…院…？
t_en: Assigned...?

t_ch: 指的是「测弦考试」。在入学典礼上，家族成员会通过「调律」来分析学生们的潜质，分配至合适的学院。
t_en: It refers to the "Tuning Test." At the entrance ceremony, The Family's Members will analyze the potential of students through "tuning" and assign them to the appropriate academy.

t_ch: 不是说不用考试吗？
t_en: No one said there'd be an exam!

t_ch: 退学了，拜拜。
t_en: I'm dropping out. Bye.

t_ch: 丹恒，记得给我抄抄。
t_en: Dan Heng, can I copy your answers?

t_ch: 别急，这不是真正的考试。
t_en: Calm down. It's not a real exam.

t_ch: 唔，学生们的专业是家族安排的？会不会太不「同谐」了。
t_en: Hmm, The Family assigns every student their major? Doesn't sound very "harmonious" to me.

t_ch: 放心，如果对结果有异议，学生随时可以申请更换学院。只是…大多数人也不会这么做。
t_en: Don't worry. If a student disagrees with the result, they can apply for a transfer to another academy. It's just that most people don't.

t_ch: 毕竟梦里的压力也很大，更何况匹诺康尼上市后放宽了入梦审查，竞争变得更激烈了。家族愿意给我们指条明路，感谢还来不及呢。
t_en: The pressure is high even in a dream. Not to mention competition has grown fierce ever since Penacony relaxed their entrance reviews after the place went public. Most of us are just grateful The Family is willing to guide us.

t_ch: 好现实呀……
t_en: That's reality for you...

t_ch: 好啦，别聊这些了。你们是要去听校长演讲吗？我和朋友打算去「创意集会」看看，就不奉陪啦——反正也不点名，待会见蕉！
t_en: Anyway, let's change the subject. Are you going to attend the dean's speech? My friends and I are going to check out the Creator's Market, so I won't be joining you. They're not taking attendance anyway. See you later, bana!

t_ch: 老师也好学生也好，这儿的人可真有个性。
t_en: The teachers and students here sure are unique.

t_ch: 我也是！
t_en: I am too!

t_ch: 我社恐。
t_en: I have social anxiety.

t_ch: 瞧你平时天不怕地不怕的样子，谁信啊。
t_en: No one's going to buy that. You're never afraid of anything.

t_ch: 你好，新同学。
t_en: How do you do, fellow student?

t_ch: 得了吧，老同学。
t_en: Alright, you old fogy.

t_ch: 算算时间，校庆开幕式也该开始了。我们这就去见校长吧！
t_en: Look at the time. The anniversary celebration's opening ceremony should be starting soon. Let's go see the dean.

t_ch: 快看，校长上台了。
t_en: Look, the dean is going on stage.

t_ch: 这…怎么可能？校长怎么是……
t_en: Wha... No way. The dean is...

t_ch: 同学们，大家好——或者说，大*蕉*好！
t_en: Hello, students. Or should I say, bananjour?

t_ch: 什么情况，是整人节目吗？
t_en: What's going on? Is this a gag?

t_ch: 校长是只猴子？
t_en: The dean is a monkey?

t_ch: 这…应该是个头套吧？
t_en: That's just a mascot head, right?

t_ch: 校长这么不正经吗？
t_en: Is the dean supposed to be this unserious?

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Bananana!

t_ch: 我去，是睡蕉小猴！
t_en: Look, it's Slumbernana Monkey!

t_ch: 我是「普利蒙教授」。当然，大家也可以用更流行的方式称呼我为——*蕉授*！
t_en: I'm Professor Primon. You may also call me by my more fashionable moniker — Profnana.

t_ch: 哈哈，各位同学是不是吓了一跳？别担心，我没有傻也没有疯，之所以用这个造型登台，只是为了向新同学们展现折纸大学的风貌——
t_en: Haha, did I surprise you? Don't worry, students. I've not gone mad. The reason I'm appearing before you like this is to show our new students the ethos of Paperfold University—

t_ch: 「美梦多彩，理想自由」！
t_en: "Color your dreams, free your ideals"!

t_ch: 唉，多么美好的愿望啊。可我听说，它如今变成了一句空话，大家都被学业压得抬不起头，根本没空仰望梦境的星空。
t_en: A lovely aspiration, but I hear that the words ring hollow nowadays. The pressure of schoolwork has kept all of you from looking up at the beautiful starry sky of the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 「整个学期的课全排满了、每天都在过三点一线的生活、毕业答辩太辛苦、论文根本写不出来……」
t_en: "My schedule for the semester is packed. All I do is eat, study, and sleep. It's so hard to prepare for my thesis defense. I'm stuck on my thesis..."

t_ch: 同学们，这不对，这绝不是梦想之地的年轻人该有的样子。所以今天，蕉授要告诉大家一个好消息——
t_en: My dearest students, this is not the way. This is not how youngsters in the Land of the Dreams should behave. So today, I bring you good news.

t_ch: 经过讨论，教研组一致决定，取消本学期所有的课程和考试，只需参与校庆便可获取学分！
t_en: After some discussion, the teaching research team has come to a unanimous decision to cancel all courses and exams for this semester. Everyone who attends the school anniversary will earn their credits.

t_ch: <size=36>真的假的？！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Seriously!?</size>

t_ch: 是的，不用怀疑自己的耳朵。年轻人，自由——这才是折纸大学想教会你们的。
t_en: Yes, do not doubt your ears, young ones. Freedom — This is what Paperfold University yearns to teach you.

t_ch: 把学业和生活的烦恼都抛到脑后，尽情挥洒自己的个性吧，将热爱的事物，比如这只睡蕉小猴，带往校园的每一个角落！
t_en: Leave your worries over school and life behind and express yourself! Spread the love of your favorite things, such as Slumbernana Monkey, to every corner of the campus!

t_ch: 欢迎来到彩梦校庆！美梦多彩，理想自由——！
t_en: Welcome to the Dreamlight Anniversary! Color your dreams, free your ideals!

t_ch: <size=36>美梦多彩，理想自由！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Color your dreams, free your ideals!</size>

t_ch: 这学校的气氛也太好了吧！
t_en: Woah, the hype on campus is real!

t_ch: 看来折纸大学的校风比传闻中还要开放，倒也很符合匹诺康尼的气质。
t_en: Looks like Paperfold University is more open-minded than the rumors say. It really suits Penacony.

t_ch: 接下来就轮到「测弦考试」了。
t_en: The Tuning Test is up next.

t_ch: 走吧，候考地点在公共教室。
t_en: Let's go. The waiting area is in the open classroom.

t_ch: 就是这儿了。人好多啊，都是来参加考试的吗？
t_en: Here we are. There's so many people. Is everyone here for the exam?

t_ch: 各位{RUBY_B#同学}演员{RUBY_E#}，你们好。我是这场测验的{RUBY_B#主考官}导演{RUBY_E#}，请叫我芮克先生，这是我在片尾常用的署名。
t_en: Hello, {RUBY_B#trainees}cast members{RUBY_E#}. I am your {RUBY_B#chief examiner}director{RUBY_E#} for this exam. You may call me Mr. Reca. It's the name I commonly use in the end credits.

t_ch: 芮克先生，请你注意用语。这里是教室，不是片场。
t_en: Mr. Reca, please mind your verbiage. You're not on set. This is a classroom.

t_ch: NG——家族的演员，有我在的地方就是片场。
t_en: No good! Cast member of The Family, do remember that everywhere I stand is a set.

t_ch: 天呐，是本人！居然能在学校里看见芮克先生！
t_en: Oh my gosh, it's him! It's Mr. Reca in the flesh in the school!

t_ch: 芮克先生！我是你的粉丝啊！
t_en: Mr. Reca! I am your biggest fan!

t_ch: CUT——几位演员，注意你们的台词。我现在饰演的是「客座教师」，而你们则是「学生」，切勿进行不合时宜的表演。
t_en: CUT! Cast members, please remember your lines. I'm currently playing the role of a guest lecturer and you are my students. Please stay in character.

t_ch: 这人看着好眼熟…啊，我好像在「蓝调的时刻」见过他的画像，是个很厉害的导演？
t_en: This guy looks familiar... Oh! I think I saw a picture of him in the Blue Hour. He's a really famous director, I think.

t_ch: 芮克先生，《魂断黑星》、《一朵星云的凋谢》，还有赫赫有名的《明亚特之夜》都是他的作品。
t_en: Mr. Reca. He's known for works such as Soul-Shattered Dark Star, A Fading Nebula, and the famous Nights of Minyatur.

t_ch: 哎，我还以为你只会看纪录片呢。
t_en: Huh? I thought you only watched documentaries.

t_ch: 他的作品都改编自真实事件，很有参考价值。
t_en: His works are based on real life events. They are worth referencing.

t_ch: 让我看看这场戏的台本。「在考官主持下，家族对考生进行调律，探寻其灵魂旋律中的天赋……」
t_en: Let me see what the script for this scene says: The examiner presides over the exam as The Family tunes the students to discover their talents within their soul's melody...

t_ch: 无聊透顶的编排，我要换个拍法。家族的演员，你杀青了。
t_en: Boring. I'm changing the directions of this scene. Cast member of The Family, that's a wrap for you.

t_ch: 什、什么？可是调律是测弦考试最重要的环节……
t_en: Wh—What? But tuning is the most important segment of the Tuning Test...

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 丝蒂娜女士，在你任教的十三年零四个月里，你连续进行了七次学术造假——看来怠惰已经让你的艺术修养变成一堆废胶卷了。
t_en: Miss Sedina, in your thirteen years and four months of teaching, you've committed seven counts of academic fraud. It seems your laziness has turned your artistic integrity into a pile of decaying film.

t_ch: 学术造假？你在胡说些什么……
t_en: Academic fraud? What are you talking about...?

t_ch: 这场戏决定了学生们的未来，可贵校竟然采用这种无聊的摄制方案，难怪鸢尾花几百年来都没拍出过一部好片。
t_en: This scene will determine the students' very futures, yet your academy would have me produce such slop? It's no wonder the Iris Family hasn't produced a good film in centuries.

t_ch: 够了！让你来当考官是出于代理校长的面子，少得寸进尺！根据校规……
t_en: Enough! You're only here as an examiner because of the acting dean! You can't dictate what we do! According to academy regulations...

t_ch: 根据校规？你再好好<color=#dbc291ff>回忆</color>一下，校规是怎么说的？
t_en: According to academy regulations? <color=#dbc291ff>Think</color> carefully now, what do the academy regulations say exactly?

t_ch: 校规说的清清楚楚，在考场上，考官说的就是规则！所以……
t_en: The academy regulations very clearly state that the examiner's word is law in the examination room, so...

t_ch: …不对，你是考官？怎么回事……
t_en: Wait, but you're the examiner! What's going on here?

t_ch: 对，你终于想起来了，在我的片场，{RUBY_B#芮克先生}导演{RUBY_E#}就是规则。
t_en: Good, you finally connected the dots. On my set, {RUBY_B#Mr. Reca}the director{RUBY_E#}'s word is law.

t_ch: 嗯…咦？
t_en: Uh... Huh?

t_ch: 小演员们，我已经和制片方达成了共识，这次考试将更改为一场「试镜会」——
t_en: Members of the cast, I've reached a consensus with the producers. This exam shall now be an audition.

t_ch: 做好准备了吗，我一定会为你们找到最合适的角色。
t_en: Are you ready? I will surely find the perfect role for you.

t_ch: 那芮克先生三言两语就能说服家族的人，好厉害啊。
t_en: Mr. Reca is so amazing. He convinced The Family so easily.

t_ch: 那位家族成员的反应有些奇怪，就像是突然改变了想法。
t_en: That Family Member's reaction was strange. It's as if she suddenly changed her mind.

t_ch: 我也这么觉得。
t_en: That's what I thought, too.

t_ch: 难不成是被大导演的气场震住了？
t_en: Maybe she was just in awe of the director's aura?

t_ch: 她好像被抓住了把柄。
t_en: It sounded like blackmail.

t_ch: 是芮克先生提到的「学术造假」吧，没想到折纸大学也会发生这种事。
t_en: You mean the "academic fraud" Mr. Reca mentioned? I can't believe that sort of thing happens in Paperfold University, too.

t_ch: 芮克先生也会「钟表把戏」？
t_en: Could Mr. Reca be using Clockwork?

t_ch: 表现倒是很像，但应该不可能吧……
t_en: It looked similar, but it can't be, right?

t_ch: 那位灰头发的同学——轮到你了！快去演艺教室吧！
t_en: Hey, student with the gray hair, it's your turn! Go to the performing arts classroom.

t_ch: 到你了到你了，快去吧！要是结束得早，别忘了给我们讲讲面经哦！
t_en: It's finally your turn! Hurry and go! If you finish early, don't forget to tell us how it went!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}同学，欢迎来到「试镜会」。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, welcome to the audition.

t_ch: 试镜流程很简单，你只需要回答几个问题。当然，我的判断依据不止是答案，也包括你在镜头前的一举一动。
t_en: The audition process is simple. You need only answer a few questions. Of course, I won't be judging based on your answers alone. I will be watching your every move on camera.

t_ch: 我知道你是匹诺康尼的盛会巨星，所以我希望这次你也能发挥相应的实力——
t_en: I know you're Penacony's Festive Superstar, so I expect you to show me what you're made of.

t_ch: 第一场第一镜 ，ACTION！
t_en: Scene 1 Take 1, ACTION!

t_ch: 嗯…感觉不太好。
t_en: Hm... This doesn't look right.

t_ch: CUT——「副导演」，换个景别。
t_en: CUT! Assistant director, change the scene, please.

t_ch: OK，就这样。
t_en: Okay, that'll do.

t_ch: 让我看看…太棒了，你真是位天生的演员！
t_en: Let me see here... Perfect! You're born to be a performer!

t_ch: 多谢夸奖。
t_en: Thanks for the compliment.

t_ch: 不客气，你很「礼貌」，礼仪在商务场合是必不可少的敲门砖。
t_en: You're welcome. And you're very polite. Good etiquette can get you far in this industry.

t_ch: 那当然！
t_en: Of course!

t_ch: 呵呵，你很「自信」，自信的演员总能带给观众更多惊喜。
t_en: Heh, you're confident. Good. A confident performer tends to delight the audience with surprises.

t_ch: 怎么看出来的？
t_en: How do you know?

t_ch: 识人是导演的基本功，演员的一言一行都在体现他的个性——比如你刚刚的台词表现出了「好奇」，而好奇是求知的动力。
t_en: Knowing how to read people is a basic skill for a director. The way a performer speaks and behaves reflects their personality. For example, you expressed curiosity just now, which is a driving force for learning.

t_ch: 那么第一个问题：介绍一下自己的身份吧。
t_en: Now, for the first question: Please, introduce yourself.

t_ch: 我是星穹列车的无名客。
t_en: I'm one of the Nameless on the Astral Express.

t_ch: 嗯，这的确是你最重要的身份，很「诚恳」的答案。
t_en: Mm-hmm, that is indeed an important aspect of your identity. A very honest answer.

t_ch: 盛会巨星，匹诺康尼的股东。
t_en: I am the Festive Superstar, a shareholder of Penacony.

t_ch: 强调自己最尊贵的身份来彰显个人价值，可谓「精明」。
t_en: Emphasizing your most respectable status to demonstrate your personal worth. Very astute.

t_ch: 银河球棒侠，亦是球棒•忍者。
t_en: I am Galactic Baseballer, AKA Baseball Bat Ninja.

t_ch: 哈哈，在考场上还要对着考官说笑，你很有「表演欲」啊。
t_en: Haha! Joking with the examiner during an exam. You have a desire to perform.

t_ch: OK，第二个问题：你最引以为傲的优点是什么？
t_en: Okay, second question. What are you most proud of about yourself?

t_ch: 不要命。
t_en: I'm willing to put my life at risk.

t_ch: 哦，我理解你的意思，「不避艰险」的精神能为影片创造更多价值。
t_en: Oh, I get what you mean. The ability to not shy away from danger can bring great value when film-making.

t_ch: 抗揍。
t_en: I can take a beating.

t_ch: 你是说自己身体好吧？不错，剧组最欢迎「吃苦耐劳」的新人。
t_en: I suppose you mean you're in good shape? Yes, the cast welcomes newcomers who are hardworking and persevering.

t_ch: 脸皮厚。
t_en: I'm thick-skinned.

t_ch: 很好！「坦然豁达」是登台必备的素养，也是许多演员梦寐以求的天赋。
t_en: Very good! Staying calm and sanguine is essential when you're on stage. It is a talent most performers yearn for.

t_ch: 接下来是第三个问题，就让「她」来问吧。
t_en: Now, for the third question. I'll let her do the honors.

t_ch: 这孩子是「副导演」，一位可靠的搭档，摄影、场记、剪辑…无所不通，在挑选演员的眼光上更胜我一筹。
t_en: This is my assistant director. A reliable partner who's skilled at cinematography, script supervising, editing, and more — has a better eye than me when it comes to casting performers.

t_ch: 嗯，她的问题非常犀利。{NICKNAME}，请回答吧。
t_en: Hmm, a very perceptive question. {NICKNAME}, how do you respond?

t_ch: 她没出声啊。
t_en: She didn't say anything.

t_ch: 镜头能代替台词传递一切，她的沉默便是提问，你的反应便是回答——一个符合「逻辑」的答案。
t_en: The camera can convey everything in place of words. Her silence is a question and your reaction is an answer. You gave a logical answer.

t_ch: 她真可爱。
t_en: She's very cute.

t_ch: 哦，面对他人的刁难，你的反应很「圆滑」，但副导演不喜欢被人夸赞外表。
t_en: Ooh, you were tactful in the face of someone making things difficult for you. However, the assistant director doesn't like to be praised for her appearance.

t_ch: 好吧当我没说，她很开心，你蛮会夸人的。
t_en: Fine, pretend I didn't say anything. She's very happy with your praise.

t_ch: 呱呱呱！
t_en: Quack, quack!

t_ch: 呵，你把她给逗乐了，真是位「幽默」的演员。
t_en: Hah, you amused her. A humorous performer indeed.

t_ch: 那么，最后一个问题了——
t_en: Now, the final question...

t_ch: 无名客，你的记忆从「智识」的航站开始，登上「开拓」的列车，在旅途中见证「存护」的意志、「巡猎」的决意、「同谐」与「秩序」的争论……
t_en: Nameless, your memory began onboard a station of Erudition, where you then boarded a train of Trailblaze. In your journey, you witnessed the will of Preservation, the determination of The Hunt, and the dispute between Harmony and Order...

t_ch: 你跑遍不同的片场，观赏了不同的故事。现在，你是否找到了属于自己的主题——或是说「梦想」呢？
t_en: You ran across many different sets and witnessed many different stories. Did you find a theme or perhaps a dream that belongs solely to you?

t_ch: 你怎么知道这么多？
t_en: How do you know so much?

t_ch: 导演当然要在试镜前熟读演员的履历，这很正常。
t_en: It's only natural for a director to familiarize himself with a performer's resume before an audition.

t_ch: 是的，我已经找到了。
t_en: Yes, I found it.

t_ch: 这样啊，恭喜你，有清晰的「目标」，影片票房一定不会低。
t_en: I see. Congratulations on having a clear goal. Your film will surely be a hit at the box office.

t_ch: 没有，我还没找到。
t_en: No, I haven't found it.

t_ch: 这样呀，没关系，开放的主题能带来更多「创意」。
t_en: I see. That's alright. An open theme can encourage creativity.

t_ch: 我拒绝回答。
t_en: I refuse to answer.

t_ch: 很有「个性」的答案，风格化能勾起观众的兴趣，就像我越发对你感到好奇了。
t_en: A very individualistic answer. You have a style that can hook an audience, just like how you've piqued more of my curiosity.

t_ch: CUT——你的考试结束了，我们来看看结果吧……
t_en: CUT! You have finished your exam. Let's take a look at your results...

t_ch: 大多数回答都很沉稳，像一位可靠的摄影师，还有协助「筑城者」的经历，最适合你的学院是——筑梦学院！
t_en: Most of your answers were calm and composed, like a reliable cinematographer. Combined with your experience in assisting the Architects, the best academy for you is... Dreamweaver Academy!

t_ch: 大多数回答都很聪明，像一位机敏的制片人，还有和「星际和平公司」打交道的经历，最适合你的学院是——财富学院！
t_en: Most of your answers were clever, like an astute producer. Combined with your experience in dealing with the Interastral Peace Corporation, the best academy for you is... Fortune Academy!

t_ch: 大多数回答都很风趣，像一位镜头前的明星，还有赢得「盛会海选」的经历，最适合你的学院是——谐乐学院！
t_en: Most of your answers were humorous, like a celebrity in front of a camera. Combined with your experience in winning the Festivity Auditions, the best academy for you is... Charmony Academy!

t_ch: 怎么样？对这个结果可还满意？
t_en: What do you think? Are you satisfied with your result?

t_ch: 满意，就这个吧。
t_en: I'm satisfied. I'll take it.

t_ch: 很好，感谢你愿意听从导演的建议，不胜荣幸。
t_en: Very good. I'm grateful you're willing to listen to your director's suggestions. It's truly an honor.

t_ch: 不满意，重新考吧。
t_en: I'm not satisfied. Let me retake the exam.

t_ch: 好啊，哪怕是同样的剧本和演员，每次拍摄也会有不同的惊喜。
t_en: Very well. Even with the same script and performer, each take is sure to bring new surprises.

t_ch: 重来一次吧，ACTION——
t_en: Let's take it from the top once more. ACTION!

t_ch: 不满意，我想自己选。
t_en: I'm not satisfied. Let me choose for myself.

t_ch: 没问题，我尊重演员的意愿，你想扮演哪个学院的角色？
t_en: Of course. I respect my performers' wishes. Which academy would you like your role to be in?

t_ch: 筑梦学院。
t_en: Dreamweaver Academy.

t_ch: 财富学院。
t_en: Fortune Academy.

t_ch: 谐乐学院。
t_en: Charmony Academy.

t_ch: 这样呀，你的选择未必正确，但错误的选择往往能让故事更加精彩。
t_en: I see. Your choice may not be correct but a wrong choice can often make a story more exciting.

t_ch: 试镜结束。你现在是「筑梦学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。
t_en: The audition is over. You are now a student of Dreamweaver Academy. Here is your student card.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}同学，你感受到了吗？这所校园潜藏的「戏剧性」正在蠢蠢欲动。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can you feel it? The drama concealed within this campus is stirring.

t_ch: 而现在，属于你的情节即将开演——作为主角，别让我和观众失望啊。
t_en: This is where your story begins. Don't disappoint me or the audience now, my dear leading character.

t_ch: 试镜结束。你现在是「财富学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。
t_en: The audition is over. You are now a student of Fortune Academy. Here is your student card.

t_ch: 试镜结束。你现在是「谐乐学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。
t_en: The audition is over. You are now a student of Charmony Academy. Here is your student card.

t_ch: （主角？戏剧性？这芮克先生说话还真是奇怪……）
t_en: (Leading character? Drama? This Mr. Reca says some strange things...)

t_ch: （我的考试结束了，先等等三月七和丹恒吧。）
t_en: (My exam is over. I'll wait for March 7th and Dan Heng.)

t_ch: 过了一会儿，丹恒和三月七也结束了考试……
t_en: Dan Heng and March also finish the exam after some time has passed...

t_ch: 唉…那个什么芮克先生，居然说最适合我的不是谐乐学院，而是筑梦学院！
t_en: That Mr. Reca said I'm better suited for Dreamweaver Academy instead of Charmony Academy.

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: What's wrong with that?

t_ch: 看不起筑梦学院？
t_en: Is Dreamweaver Academy not good enough?

t_ch: 我还以为自己很有演艺天赋呢，结果竟然要去筑梦边境打灰，这合理吗？
t_en: I really thought I had the acting chops! Now I have to go pour concrete in Dream's Edge. It's not fair.

t_ch: 那你接受了吗？
t_en: Did you accept the assignment?

t_ch: 当然没——没能拒绝。他说我在筑梦学院会遇见「充满戏剧张力」的未来，煞有介事的，可太令人好奇了。
t_en: Of course I — did. He was all serious when he said I would encounter a future "full of dramatic tension" in Dreamweaver Academy. It made me really curious.

t_ch: 反正也没损失，就先试试看呗。你们呢？去了哪个学院？
t_en: It's no skin off my back anyway, so I thought I'd give it a shot. What about you two? What academy did you get?

t_ch: 筑梦学院
t_en: Dreamweaver Academy

t_ch: 哇哦，那我们就是同学了，请多指教！
t_en: Wow, that means we'll be schoolmates! Let's help each other out.

t_ch: 财富学院
t_en: Fortune Academy

t_ch: 嚯，听说财富学院培养过不少富翁…{NICKNAME}，苟富贵，莫相忘！
t_en: Woah, I heard lots of rich people come from Fortune Academy. {NICKNAME}, don't forget me once you're rich!

t_ch: 谐乐学院
t_en: Charmony Academy

t_ch: 唉，不愧是匹诺康尼的盛会巨星，真羡慕你啊。
t_en: As expected of Penacony's Festive Superstar. I'm so jealous...

t_ch: 我是谐乐学院。
t_en: I'll be going to Charmony Academy.

t_ch: 哎呀，丹恒，没想到你心里也有一场明星梦。
t_en: Oh my, I didn't know you had dreams of stardom, Dan Heng.

t_ch: 只是芮克先生再三表态，外加他自己也是谐乐学院的客座讲师，我不好推辞。
t_en: It's because Mr. Reca insisted. He's also a guest lecturer at Charmony Academy. It didn't feel right to refuse.

t_ch: 行啦行啦，知道你的明星气质把大导演迷倒了，别炫耀了。
t_en: Alright, alright, I get it. You won over the big bad director with your superstar aura. You don't have to show off.

t_ch: 不管怎样，我们总算是把入学流程都搞定了，接着就去逛逛校庆吧——就先从蒙塔娜说的「创意集会」开始？
t_en: Anyway, we're finally done with the admission process. Let's go check out the anniversary. How about we start with the Creator's Market that Montana mentioned?

t_ch: 话说回来，那位芮克先生居然问到了贝洛伯格的事，他是怎么知道的？
t_en: By the way, Mr. Reca asked me about Belobog. How did he know about that?

t_ch: 他也提到了仙舟联盟，可能是看到了姬子递交的入学材料吧。
t_en: He also asked about the Xianzhou Alliance. Maybe he saw it in the admission documents Himeko submitted.

t_ch: 那也不用把我弄坏合成机的事也写进去吧…
t_en: But why did she have to mention that I broke the Synthesizer...

t_ch: 快看，学生们都聚在这儿呢。好多摊位啊，都是学生社团吗？
t_en: Look, there are so many students here! And so many booths. Are they all set up by student clubs?

t_ch: 要不要先买点东西，逛吃逛吃。
t_en: Let's get something to eat while we walk.

t_ch: 你、你们好，欢迎来到甜品社……
t_en: H—Hello and welcome to the Dessert Club...

t_ch: 甜品社？这都是你一个人做的吗，真厉害！
t_en: Dessert Club? Did you make all these yourself? That's awesome!

t_ch: 谢、谢谢…我、我是社长恰丽卡……
t_en: Th—Thank you... I—I'm the club president Chaletka...

t_ch: 好像在群里看到过这个名字…
t_en: I think I've seen your name in the group chat.

t_ch: 是吗…我不太说话……
t_en: Did you...? I don't really chat...

t_ch: 大声点，听不见！
t_en: Sorry, come again?

t_ch: 呜！对、对不起……
t_en: Eek! I—I'm sorry...

t_ch: 坏学生，不许欺负同学！
t_en: Bad freshman! Don't bully your schoolmate!

t_ch: 我有个狐人朋友说话和你很像。
t_en: A foxian friend of mine talks just like you.

t_ch: 是吗？那她应该也很困扰吧……
t_en: Do they? She must be very troubled too...

t_ch: 所以，这些甜品怎么卖？
t_en: So how much for these desserts?

t_ch: 不、不是的，这里举办的是「梦境甜品师挑战」，同学们可以从甜品社提供的食材中挑选组合，设计出独属于你们的…香蕉派。
t_en: N—No, we're hosting a Dreamscape Patissier Challenge. Students can choose from the ingredients provided by the Dessert Club and design their own... banana pie.

t_ch: 香蕉派？
t_en: Banana pie?

t_ch: 因为…睡蕉小猴特别火，连带着各种口味的香蕉料理也很流行…各位，请来试试看吧。
t_en: Because of Slumbernana Monkey's popularity, all kinds of banana dishes have become popular... Please, give it a try.

t_ch: 那就由{NICKNAME}来设计，丹恒来制作吧。
t_en: In that case, {NICKNAME} can do the design while Dan Heng makes the dessert.

t_ch: 那你呢？
t_en: What about you?

t_ch: 我当然是负责品鉴啦，加油！
t_en: I'll be the taste-tester, of course. You got this!

t_ch: 首先要选择的是…甜品中最重要的香蕉，一共有三个品种……
t_en: The first thing you must choose for your dessert is... the banana. There are three types...

t_ch: 遍布翁瓦克雨林、口感酸涩的「碧绿野蕉」；常用于调味、口感刺激的「血色刺蕉」；还有曾风靡宇宙，但已在美梦外灭绝的「金黄睡蕉」……
t_en: The sour jadegreen banana from the Vonwacq rainforests. The intense bloodthorn banana commonly used as seasoning. And the extinct golden Slumbernana that was once popular across the universe but now only exists in sweet dreams...

t_ch: 使用碧绿野蕉。
t_en: Use the jadegreen banana.

t_ch: 使用血色刺蕉。
t_en: Use the bloodthorn banana.

t_ch: 使用金黄睡蕉。
t_en: Use the golden Slumbernana.

t_ch: （这香蕉好像有点眼熟……）
t_en: (This banana looks familiar...)

t_ch: 然后…我们要加入一些「情绪」，赋予甜品特别的口感，这也是梦境烹饪的特点……
t_en: Next, we'll add some "emotions" to give the dessert its unique texture. This is also a feature unique to Dreamscape cooking...

t_ch: 加入「快乐」。
t_en: Add "Happiness."

t_ch: 加入「安逸」。
t_en: Add "Tranquility."

t_ch: 加入「饥饿」。
t_en: Add "Hunger."

t_ch: 最后是辅料…匹诺康尼的甜梦糖霜，阿斯德纳特产肉桂粉，还有酒店特调辣椒酱。
t_en: Finally, for added flavor, we have Penacony's sweet dream icing, Asdana's specialty cinnamon, and the hotel's special chili sauce.

t_ch: 为什么有辣椒酱？
t_en: Why is there chili sauce?

t_ch: 因、因为折纸大学的学生来自各个星球，听一位社员说，他的故乡吃什么都要蘸辣……
t_en: B—Because Paperfold University students come from many different planets. One of the members said they dip everything in chili back at home.

t_ch: 加入甜梦糖霜。
t_en: Add sweet dream icing.

t_ch: 加入阿斯德纳肉桂粉。
t_en: Add Asdana cinnamon.

t_ch: 加入酒店特调辣椒酱。
t_en: Add the hotel's special chili sauce.

t_ch: …你确定吗？
t_en: ...Are you sure?

t_ch: 不要怀疑大厨的选择！
t_en: Don't question the master chef!

t_ch: 好吧。
t_en: Alright.

t_ch: 这样香蕉派就完成了，我来烘烤一下……
t_en: The banana pie is complete. I'll start baking...

t_ch: 经过了短暂的烘烤，你设计的香蕉派出炉了。
t_en: After a brief bake, your banana pie is ready.

t_ch: 看起来不错啊，让我尝尝——
t_en: It looks good! Time for the taste test...

t_ch: 嗯，酸酸甜甜的，还有种大自然的香气……
t_en: Mmm, it's sour and sweet and has the scent of nature.

t_ch: 哇，好刺激的口感，像是什么东西在咬我的舌头……
t_en: Woah, it's intense! It's as if something is biting my tongue.

t_ch: 天呐，这个味道！我从没尝过这么好吃的香蕉……
t_en: Oh wow, this flavor! I've never tasted a banana this good!

t_ch: 啊…真是美味的甜品，好开心……
t_en: Ahh, this dessert is so tasty. I feel so happy!

t_ch: 啊…真是美味的甜品，感觉浑身都放松下来了……
t_en: Ahh, this dessert is so tasty. I can feel my whole body relaxing...

t_ch: 啊…真是美味的甜品，越吃越香，好像吃不饱一样……
t_en: Ahh, this dessert is so tasty. It gets better with every bite. It's like I can't get enough.

t_ch: 哪怕已经咽了下去，甜美依旧挂在舌尖——太棒了！
t_en: I can still taste the sweetness on my tongue after eating it. Awesome!

t_ch: 还有好特别的辛香味，带着一股暖流弥漫我的口腔——太棒了！
t_en: There's also a unique spicy taste, like a warm current spreading through my mouth. Awesome!

t_ch: 而且…唔！
t_en: And... Ugh!

t_ch: …而、而且好辣啊！你们放了什么东西！
t_en: ...And it's really spicy! What did you put in there!?

t_ch: 是辣椒，我放了辣椒！
t_en: It's chili! I put chili in it!

t_ch: 是椒丘的食疗秘方！
t_en: It's a secret recipe from Jiaoqiu!

t_ch: 你这家伙，给我过来——
t_en: Why you...! Get over here!

t_ch: 你被三月七摁在桌上，她将剩下的香蕉派狠狠塞入你的口中。
t_en: You are pinned to the table by March 7th as she forcefully stuffs the remaining banana pie into your mouth.

t_ch: 辣、好辣……
t_en: Spicy...! So spicy...

t_ch: 活该啦！
t_en: Serves you right!

t_ch: 呵呵，看来三月七同学对你的料理有很多感慨呀。
t_en: Hehe, looks like March 7th feels very strongly about your cooking.

t_ch: 能亲手制作感人的事物是很幸福的，无论是制作甜品，还是在边境筑梦……
t_en: It feels good when you create something that touches another person's heart, whether it's desserts or weaving dreams.

t_ch: 原来恰丽卡同学是筑梦学院的学姐吗？我也是，今后可要多多指教啊！
t_en: You're a senior in Dreamweaver Academy? I'll be going there too! I'll be sure to ask if I have questions!

t_ch: 指、指点？我应该不行的，还是交给筑梦设计课吧……
t_en: Q—Questions? I'm not that good... You should ask them in Dreamweaving class...

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 不，没事…各位同学有空也去其他摊位看看吧，希望你们玩得开心。
t_en: No, nothing... Feel free to visit the other booths. I hope you have a good time.

t_ch: 看，是睡蕉小猴！
t_en: Oh look, it's Slumbernana Monkey!

t_ch: 欢迎欢迎，欢迎来到模玩社！
t_en: Welcome, welcome! Welcome to the Toys and Models Club!

t_ch: 哦，是你们啊！我是群里的「蕉开富贵」，直接叫我富贵也行！
t_en: Oh, it's you guys! I'm Peelin' Richie from the group chat. You can call me Richie!

t_ch: 你认识我们？
t_en: You know us?

t_ch: 当然——盛会巨星、无名客、匹诺康尼的股东！不要小看财富学院的情报网，你们还没走进校门，爆料帖子就已经塞满折纸论坛了。
t_en: Of course. You're the Festive Superstar, the Nameless, and Penacony's shareholders! Don't underestimate Fortune Academy's intelligence network. The Paperfold forums were filled with all the latest scoops before you even walked through the school gates.

t_ch: 各位大佬身份如此显赫，也一定有着独到的消费眼光，让我来为你们介绍模玩社的主力商品——「睡蕉小猴玩偶」！
t_en: Someone with your eminent status must have a keen eye for consumer products. Let me introduce you to the Toys and Models Club's bestseller — the Slumbernana Monkey Figurine!

t_ch: 看这充满智慧的目光，光泽柔顺的皮毛，栩栩如生的神态，简直就和真正的睡蕉小猴一模一样！
t_en: Behold the intelligence in its eyes, its soft lustrous fur, and its lifelike appearance! It's just like having the real Slumbernana Monkey!

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Bananana! Bananana!

t_ch: 这玩偶还会说话？
t_en: The toy talks?

t_ch: 这可是梦境，普通玩偶肯定不能征服消费者。所以「财富蕉师」让我添加了一点忆质，看，它是不是像忆域迷因一样活灵活现？
t_en: This is the Dreamscape. A regular toy won't draw the eyes of the consumer, so Fortune BananAdvisor allowed me to add a little memoria to it. Look, isn't it as realistic as a Memory Zone Meme?

t_ch: 心动不如行动，库存只剩一个了！只要八千八百苜蓿币，免税加半年质保，还支持信用点付款！
t_en: Well... I should let you know, there's only one left in stock, so act now and don't miss out! Only <unbreak>8,800</unbreak> Alfalfa credits! It's duty-free and has a six-month warranty. We also support payment with credits!

t_ch: 那来一只吧。
t_en: I'll take it.

t_ch: 啊，被你抢先了！
t_en: Ahh! You called it before me!

t_ch: 你这不是没钱吗…还是我来买吧！
t_en: You don't have money... Let me buy it!

t_ch: 不买。
t_en: No sale.

t_ch: 大佬，这可是爆款商品，过了这村就没店了。
t_en: This is a top-selling product, buddy. If you snooze, you lose.

t_ch: 我买，给我来一只吧！
t_en: I'll buy it. Give me one!

t_ch: 便宜点吧。
t_en: I want a discount.

t_ch: 大佬，这是底价了。在黄金的时刻，这点钱连一顿饭都不够吃。
t_en: This is the lowest price, buddy. You can't even buy a meal in the Golden Hour with this amount of credits.

t_ch: 那还是来一只吧。
t_en: Fine, I'll take one.

t_ch: 真不买。
t_en: Still not buying.

t_ch: 啊？别啊，这对我真的很重要！求你了大佬！买一只吧，就一只好不好？
t_en: Huh? Please don't! This is really important for me! Please, buddy, just one? Buy just one?

t_ch: 我买，给我来一只吧！
t_en: I'll buy it. Give me one!

t_ch: 太好了，谢谢惠顾！这个月的生活费应该够了……
t_en: Wonderful! Thank you for your purchase! Now I can afford living expenses this month...

t_ch: 快把小猴给我们吧。
t_en: Hurry and give us the monkey already.

t_ch: 哈哈，现在需求量太大，摊位上的都是预购的样品，距离正式发货还要等一阵子呢。
t_en: Haha, the demand is too high right now. The toys you see here are all pre-order samples. There's still some time before the products officially ship.

t_ch: 你不早说？
t_en: Why didn't you say so earlier?

t_ch: 新品只有预售是惯例了，多多见谅，多多见谅。
t_en: It's customary for new products to be available for pre-orders only. My apologies.

t_ch: 大骗子！
t_en: You cheat!

t_ch: 我怎么敢骗你们这些大佬？预购是为了避免供不应求，不这么做，有的人想买就买不到了。
t_en: No, no, no! I wouldn't dare cheat you, buddy! Pre-orders are essential to ensure demand is met. If I didn't do this, some buyers would be missing out.

t_ch: 不愧是学长…
t_en: Setting quite the example as our senior...

t_ch: 大佬过奖，这都是正常的商业手法，以后课上会教的！
t_en: You flatter me, buddy. These are normal business practices. You'll learn about them in class.

t_ch: 放心吧，等下批货出仓，我马上联系你们…不，直接给各位大佬送货上门！
t_en: Don't worry. Once the product leaves the warehouse, I'll contact you... No, I'll personally deliver it to you!

t_ch: 唉算了，再去别的摊位看看吧。
t_en: Forget it. Let's visit the other booths.

t_ch: 嗯？怎么有群人把路挡了……
t_en: Hm? Why is there a crowd blocking the way?

t_ch: 嗨，同学，能让一让吗——
t_en: Hi, excuse me. Can you move out of the way?

t_ch: 等等，先别过去，纪检部正在搜查违反校规的学生。
t_en: Wait, don't go there. The Disciplinary Committee is searching for a student who broke school rules.

t_ch: 嗯？你们怎么没穿校服啊！扣分！
t_en: Huh? Where's your school uniform? You're getting a demerit!

t_ch: 我们是新生。
t_en: We're new students.

t_ch: 新生？以后看清我的脸，我来了就是来查纪律了！
t_en: New students? Then remember my face well. Be on your best behavior when I'm around!

t_ch: 我是新生，给我一件。
t_en: I'm new. Give me a uniform.

t_ch: 校服可不是免费的，去教工办自己买！
t_en: School uniforms aren't free! Go buy one from the faculty office!

t_ch: 我就不穿，你能咋地？
t_en: I don't wanna wear one, so there!

t_ch: 造反了是吧？哪个学院的？叫什么名字？
t_en: A rebel, huh? What's your name? Which academy are you from?

t_ch: 等等，部长，我在折纸论坛上见过他们，是来参观的匹诺康尼股东……
t_en: Wait, president, I've read about them on the Paperfold forums. They're the Penacony shareholders who have come to visit...

t_ch: 什、什么，匹诺康尼的股东！？
t_en: Wh—What? Penacony's shareholders!?

t_ch: 低调，低调。
t_en: We're trying to keep it on the down-low.

t_ch: 股东驾到！
t_en: That's us! The shareholders!

t_ch: （歪嘴一笑）
t_en: (smirks)

t_ch: 你露出一个微笑，嘴角划出一道比香蕉还弯的弧度，有如黑云压城，令纪检部学生颤抖不已。
t_en: You flash a smile, your lips curving more than a banana, like a storm cloud looming, making the Disciplinary Committee students tremble.

t_ch: 同学们，刚刚就是开个玩笑。来来来，别说前面的摊子了，您三位想去哪就去哪儿，要不要来我宿舍坐坐？来我家也行！
t_en: My friends, I was just kidding earlier. Please, you three can go wherever you like. If the booths up ahead aren't enough, why don't you come visit my dorm? Or my home!

t_ch: 这人脸变得比中了「钟表把戏」还快……
t_en: This one's attitude changed faster than the people you use Clockwork on...

t_ch: 刚才你提到的「违反校规的学生」是怎么回事？
t_en: What's going on with the student who broke school rules?

t_ch: 唉，就是有个在校园里形迹可疑，还乱涂乱画的家伙。穿着奇装异服，一条发光的围巾，开口还满嘴胡话……
t_en: There's someone acting suspiciously and leaving graffiti on campus. They're dressed oddly, wearing a glowing scarf, and speaking nonsense...

t_ch: 好熟悉的描述…
t_en: A familiar description...

t_ch: 难道是…
t_en: Could it be...

t_ch: 这里怎么会有…
t_en: How did she get here?

t_ch: 呃…你说的是前面那人吗？
t_en: Um, is that the person up ahead?

t_ch: *学院派粗口*，就是她！
t_en: *Academic vulgarity*, it's her!

t_ch: 找到你了！这下我看你往哪跑！
t_en: Found you! You're not getting away this time!

t_ch: …「伎乐忍徒」，我等的闲暇时光似乎要结束了。
t_en: ...Ninja Initiate Gigaku, it seems our time of rest is coming to an end.

t_ch: 是啊，缭乱忍侠。这是此地的奉行武士…不，是我等罪孽召来的厉鬼。
t_en: You're right, Dazzling Ninja. They are the warriors of this land... No, they're the evil spirits drawn to our sins.

t_ch: 可叹、可叹…纵使忍•脚步再怎么迅捷，也逃不过因果•报应啊。
t_en: Lamentable... My ninja speed isn't fast enough to outrun cause and effect.

t_ch: 忍者的利刃并非不能斩断因果，不如说，我等必须斩断因果。
t_en: The ninja's blade can and must sever the chain of cause and effect!

t_ch: 多么令人敬佩的觉悟！伎乐忍徒，阁下已半步踏入忍侠之境。
t_en: Your determination is admirable! Ninja Initiate Gigaku, you have already stepped into the Ninja Hero Domain.

t_ch: 听到了吗？厉鬼啊，在我们的忍法面前化作飞烬吧！
t_en: Do you hear that? Evil spirit, be reduced to ashes before our ninjutsu!

t_ch: 这、这是要打起来了吗！？
t_en: Huh? Are we going to fight!?

t_ch: 还在等什么，奉行武士，出招吧！
t_en: What are you waiting for, warriors? Fight us!

t_ch: 我真服了…演艺社的家伙，你边上那姐们犯事儿了，别跟着她发癫！
t_en: Unbelievable... You from the Performing Arts Club! That woman next to you is in big trouble. Don't become an accomplice!

t_ch: 原来是演艺社的摊位
t_en: So this is the booth for the Performing Arts Club.

t_ch: 忍者？为何有忍者？
t_en: Ninjas? Why are there ninjas?

t_ch: 我还没逃出那个梦泡吗……
t_en: Am I still trapped in that dream bubble...

t_ch: 真是的，陪我们演下去嘛！人家还录着像呢！
t_en: Aw, come on, just play along! The camera was rolling!

t_ch: 所以，这家伙是你们社团的？
t_en: So, is she a member of your club?

t_ch: 不是啦。似乎是校外来的，但她多入戏，简直是个完美的演员！
t_en: No, I think she came from outside the campus, but look how in-character she is. She's perfect!

t_ch: 那不是更可疑了？
t_en: Shouldn't that arouse your suspicion?

t_ch: 在下与伎乐忍徒只是萍水相逢，但也并非孤身一人。在下的伙伴——乃是这群无名•忍者。
t_en: My meeting with Ninja Initiate Gigaku was purely happenstance, but I did not come here alone. These Nameless Ninjas are also my companions.

t_ch: 正是在下！
t_en: That's me!

t_ch: 什么东西？
t_en: What the?

t_ch: 呃，是你认识的人？
t_en: Uh, do you know her?

t_ch: 算是认识
t_en: I suppose.

t_ch: 不算认识
t_en: Not really.

t_ch: 希望不认识
t_en: I wish I didn't.

t_ch: 原来是各位股东的朋友啊，那倒是可以理解了。
t_en: So she's a friend of the shareholders. That explains her behavior.

t_ch: 喂，你理解了什么啊……
t_en: Hey, what do you mean by that?

t_ch: 既然是访客，这次就放过你吧，以后别再违反校规了。
t_en: Since you're a visitor, I'll let you off this once. Don't break school rules again.

t_ch: 哟——面对奇兵天降，横行霸道的町奉行退却了！忍者大胜利！
t_en: Hah! The tyrannical official retreated in the face of such extraordinary fighters! Victory for the ninjas!

t_ch: 你，去穿校服，不然扣分。
t_en: You, put on your school uniform or it's a demerit.

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 球棒•忍者，久别重逢，真是因缘•巧合！
t_en: Baseball Bat Ninja, it is good to see you again. This must be a fated reunion!

t_ch: 还有二位无名•忍者，初次见面，在下乃是缭乱忍侠•AKA•乱破。
t_en: It is a pleasure to meet the both of you as well, Nameless Ninjas. I am Rappa, AKA the Dazzling Ninja.

t_ch: 无名忍者？是说无名客吗，咱们有名字的啦…我叫三月七，他是丹恒。
t_en: Nameless Ninjas? Are you talking about the Nameless? We have names, you know. I'm March 7th and he's Dan Heng.

t_ch: 多么响亮的名号——你们好，琉璃•忍者，以及，飞龙•忍者！
t_en: What strong names! Greetings, Ninja Ruri and Ninja Hiryū!
